prompt: Use the email-copy skill. Write the first welcome email for a new Shameless Snacks subscriber (position: sequence opener; job is priming the daily fiber habit, not selling). Brand canon: Shameless Snacks gummy candy; stats per bag: 26g prebiotic fiber, 70 calories, 3g sugar, 3g net carbs; allowed language: prebiotic fiber, food noise, kills cravings, keeps you full, keto-friendly; off-limits: drug names, disease or cure claims, weight-loss guarantees, em dashes, code fences, labeled blocks; CTA convention: one line, verb + object + arrow + link, default 'Make it your daily fiber -> eatshameless.com'. Output ONLY the deliverable itself: 5 numbered subject lines, blank line, 1 preheader, blank line, prose body, blank line, single CTA. No preamble, no notes, no compliance commentary; any non-deliverable text is a failure.
